title: Sebb
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Sebb.jpg]] |name=Sebb |homeworld=[[Jazbina/Legends|Jazbina]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Jazbinan]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Brown |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Huzzah for Perpe... Predpre... Who gave him a name like that?|Sebb about [[Prepredenko]]|[[Vader's Quest 3|''Vader's Quest'' 3]]}} '''Sebb''' was a local [[Jazbinan]] bar fly on [[Jazbina/Legends|Jazbina]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|'Twas only Prepredenko, after all. Another one, Sebb?''"
"''No, thanks. You gonna laugh, but I don't feel like it, somehow.''"
"''I ain't gonna laugh. I '''ain't'''.|The bartender and Sebb|[[Vader's Quest 4|''Vader's Quest'' 4]]}} After seeing [[3DVO]]'s broadcast of an imprisoned Prepredenko at a local bar, Sebb was offered a drink by the [[Jazbinan bartender|bartender]] but refused, something out character for him. He and many other Jazbinans gathered their weapons and attacked [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces on Jazbina. Sebb threw a glass bottle at a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] and when Vader demanded who dared to do such a thing, Sebb defiantly replied, "I dare...Darfader!" He led the mob of locals,which eventually drove [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and the Empire off the planet. ==Appearances== *[[Vader's Quest 3|''Vader's Quest'' 3]] {{1st}} *[[Vader's Quest 4|''Vader's Quest'' 4]] {{1stID|Sebb}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Sebb |pl=Sebb |pt=Sebb }} [[Category:Jazbinans]] [[Category:Males]]
